About Leading Property Co

Trusted Experts in
UK Property Investment

We exist to make premium UK property investment accessible, transparent, and genuinely hands-off for every investor.

Our Story

Built on Trust,
Driven by Results

Leading Property Co was founded with a singular mission: to democratise access to high-quality, professionally managed UK property investment. We believe that building wealth through property should not require significant time, deep market knowledge, or the burden of day-to-day management.

Our team of dedicated property specialists sources, vets, and manages investment opportunities across the UK's most dynamic markets — from off-plan developments in Manchester to government-backed Specialist Supported Housing nationwide.

We operate as part of a wider ecosystem alongside Leading Circle — our referral and partnership programme — and our dedicated Specialist Supported Housing division.

🏗

Off-Plan Property Investment

Off-plan investment means purchasing a property before it has been built or completed. By reserving early, investors secure units at below-market prices and benefit from capital appreciation throughout the construction period. By the time the development completes, your property is typically worth more than you paid.

  • Below-market entry pricing on new-build developments
  • Capital appreciation throughout the build period
  • Staged payment structures to manage cash flow
  • NHBC 10-year structural warranty on all new builds
  • Projected NET yields of 6 to 10% upon completion
  • Fully managed with tenants sourced before handover
Capital GrowthNew BuildBelow Market PriceHands-Off
🏢

Completed Property Investment

Completed properties are ready-to-go investment assets either already tenanted or immediately available to let. There is no waiting period; your investment starts generating income from the moment you complete. Our team sources, vets, and manages everything on your behalf.

  • Immediate rental income from day one
  • Tenants already in place or ready-to-let
  • Full property management service included
  • Regular financial statements and reporting
  • Annual portfolio reviews with your consultant
  • Available across all major UK investment cities
Immediate IncomeFully ManagedTenantedReady Now

What is SSH?

Housing for
Vulnerable Adults

Specialist Supported Housing provides accommodation and care support to vulnerable adults including those with learning disabilities, mental health conditions, physical disabilities, or those transitioning out of care.

The UK government has a statutory duty to house these individuals and funds their accommodation through Housing Benefit, a government-backed income stream paid directly to property investors via regulated care providers.

This creates one of the most stable, secure, and ethically positive investment propositions available in the UK property market today.

Why Invest in SSH?

Unparalleled
Investment Security

  • Government-backed income with no reliance on private tenants
  • 25-year lease terms provide extraordinary income certainty
  • CPI+1% annual rent reviews protect against inflation
  • Zero void periods as provider pays rent regardless of occupancy
  • Fully managed by experienced regulated care operators
  • Chronic national undersupply driving long-term demand
  • Capital growth potential alongside strong rental income
  • Positive social impact housing the most vulnerable
Key Benefits

Everything Investors Want

💚

Strongest Markets

Detailed investment analysis for the UK's highest-performing property markets.

Manchester
The UK's #1 Buy-to-Let Destination

Manchester has cemented its position as the UK's premier property investment city. A world-class economy anchored by financial services, digital, creative industries, and higher education, combined with one of Europe's youngest, most dynamic populations, drives extraordinary rental demand.

7–9%
Average NET Yield

Why Invest in Manchester?

  • UK's fastest-growing city economy outside London
  • 95,000+ students creating year-round rental demand
  • Major employers: BBC, ITV, KPMG, Deloitte
  • £1bn+ Noma development transforming city centre
  • MediaCityUK creating tech & media employment hub
  • HS2 connectivity reducing the London gap
  • Manchester Airport, 3rd busiest UK airport
  • Chronic residential undersupply vs. demand
Leeds
The North's Financial & Legal Powerhouse

Leeds is home to the UK's largest financial and legal centre outside London, a thriving tech sector, and two major universities. The South Bank regeneration scheme alone will add £5bn to the local economy.

Birmingham
The UK's Second City, Reimagined

Birmingham is undergoing its most significant transformation in a generation. The legacy of the 2022 Commonwealth Games, HSBC's UK HQ relocation, HS2 terminus, and a £700m city centre regeneration programme have repositioned the UK's second city as a tier-one investment destination.

London
Global Capital. Unrivalled Capital Growth.

Frequently Asked Questions

Answers to the most common questions from our investor community.

News & Resources

Frequently Asked Questions

Answers to the most common questions from our investor community.

General Investment

What is hands-off property investment? +
Hands-off property investment means you purchase a property as an investment asset, but all management responsibilities — finding tenants, rent collection, maintenance, and compliance — are handled by our professional management team. You simply receive your rental income without any day-to-day involvement.
How much do I need to invest? +
Our investment opportunities start from £99,950 for Specialist Supported Housing properties. Off-plan and completed residential properties typically start from £129,950 to £175,000 depending on location and property type. We can discuss financing options including mortgage availability during your consultation.
What returns can I expect? +
Returns vary by investment type. Specialist Supported Housing offers up to 13% NET yields on 25-year government-backed leases. Off-plan and completed residential properties typically yield 6–9% NET depending on location. All projected yields are clearly stated for each opportunity we present.
Is property investment right for me? +
Property investment is suitable for a wide range of investors. The best approach depends on your goals, budget, risk appetite, and time horizon. Our team will provide personalised guidance during a free consultation.

Specialist Supported Housing

What is Specialist Supported Housing? +
Specialist Supported Housing (SSH) provides accommodation for vulnerable adults including those with learning disabilities, mental health conditions, or physical disabilities. Properties are leased to regulated care providers on long-term government-backed leases, delivering exceptional returns to investors with complete management handled.
How is the income secured? +
Income is backed by UK government Housing Benefit. The care provider is legally obligated to pay rent for the full 25-year lease term, regardless of property occupancy. This creates one of the most secure income streams available to any investor.
What does CPI+1% mean? +
CPI (Consumer Price Index) is the UK's measure of inflation. A CPI+1% rent review means your rental income increases each year by the rate of inflation plus an additional 1%. This ensures your returns not only keep pace with but exceed inflation over the 25-year lease term.
Do I need to be involved in management? +
No — SSH is entirely hands-off for the investor. The regulated care provider manages all aspects of tenancy, care provision, maintenance, and compliance. Your role is simply to own the property and receive your quarterly rental income payments.

Leading Circle

Your Partnership With Us

Leading Circle is our structured referral and partnership programme designed for property professionals, financial advisors, mortgage brokers, accountants, and anyone who works with potential property investors.

1
Register Free

Sign up to Leading Circle at no cost. Receive your unique referral code and access to our partner portal and marketing materials.

2
Make an Introduction

Introduce a client or lead to Leading Property Co using your personal referral link or by notifying our team directly.

3
We Close the Deal

Our expert investment consultants handle all client interactions and the full sales process — you don't need to do anything more.

4
Collect Your Fee

Receive your referral commission upon completion. Fees are paid promptly and transparently.
